proven.claim: PROVEN: Signals count accurately reflects contracts.length
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P2, P6
; LINE: 437
; PROVEN: Signals count accurately reflects contracts.length
(declare-const contracts_length Int)
(declare-const logged_signals Int)
(assert (>= contracts_length 0))
(assert (= logged_signals contracts_length))
(assert (not (= logged_signals contracts_length)))
(check-sat)
; unsat → log matches contracts.length exactly
